name: supermap-docs
description: Complete SuperMap GIS platform documentation skill with fast indexed search — covers iServer REST API (22 service categories), iPortal (9 modules), iClient3D for WebGL/WebGPU (735 API classes, 211 examples), and iClient for JavaScript (5 libraries, 1,085 API pages, 673 examples). 4,325 bundled reference files for offline AI agent retrieval.
